reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger operating-model framing, clearer hybrid-fleet logic, and more honest treatment of setup burden.
strengths: The article no longer treats mobility as self-evident value and instead asks what kind of flexibility the mission actually needs.
The added setup and calibration discussion improves realism significantly.
The hybrid-fleet model makes the comparison more useful for real programs than a simple fixed-versus-mobile dichotomy.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it ties flexibility to operations, staffing, and support burden rather than to transportability alone.
